tasks.title: Authenticated HTTP surface: stats + session-replay handlers on core/auth router (reject-before-parse, no resume-with-prompt, authority-scoped not-found)

scenarios: An unauthenticated stats request is rejected before body parse
A route registered with auth=none fails to register at boot
A replayed nonce is rejected
A stale-timestamp request is rejected
A tampered body invalidates the HMAC signature
Session-replay mints a new gated workflow from a read-only snapshot
A replay lookup for an unknown id returns not-found
An id the caller has no authority over is indistinguishable from a missing id

tasks.title: Ingest event surface: typed IncidentEnvelope + per-field grammar, run dedup/flap/burst/correlate, publish triage.requested keyed by external_ref

scenarios: An ingest adapter publishes a triage.requested event keyed by external_ref
Ingest runs dedup, flap, burst, and correlate before publishing

tasks.title: session_risk_audit persistence contract: required-field row appended to the hash-chained governance ledger

scenarios: Every risk classification appends one session_risk_audit row to the ledger

tasks.title: schema_version stamping registry: writer stamps current version, reader rejects future versions with SchemaVersionError

scenarios: Every governed row is stamped with its writer's schema_version
A reader rejects a row written by a future schema version

tasks.title: discovered_scheduled_reboots persistence contract: bi-temporal per-tenant registry with kill switch and valid_until

scenarios: The discovered_scheduled_reboots registry is bi-temporal with a kill switch

tasks.title: escalation_queue persistence contract: append-only rate-capped requeue lane that re-enters the gated pipeline

scenarios: The escalation_queue is append-only and re-enters the gated pipeline

tasks.title: Generated wire contracts (REQ-501b): emit openapi.yaml/asyncapi.yaml/JSON Schemas from the canonical model with 100%-endpoint coverage and provenance

scenarios: Generated wire contracts cover every routed endpoint with provenance

tasks.title: Browser operator session (REQ-508): AuthReadOnly/AuthOperatorLogin/AuthSession route classes, HMAC-signed server-registered cookie, digest-only operators, rate-limited login, fail-closed composition

scenarios: An operator login issues a read-only session that satisfies the read surface
A session principal never satisfies a machine route and never writes
Tampered, expired, and revoked session cookies are rejected before the handler runs
Operator login is rate-limited per operator and source ip

tasks.title: Sessions read surface (REQ-509): audit-spine session list (latest classification per ref ⋈ mechanical verdict), GET-only, bounded, fail-closed

scenarios: The sessions surface serves the audit spine over an operator session
An unwired sessions surface fails closed instead of fabricating rows

tasks.title: Alerts read surface (REQ-510): bounded accepted-envelope log appended at the ingest front door, GET-only, fail-closed

scenarios: An accepted ingest appears on the alerts surface with its validated fields
A rejected payload never reaches the alerts surface

tasks.title: Governance + secret-reference read surfaces (REQ-511/512): posture from authoritative components; references-only secrets, valueless by construction

scenarios: The governance surface reports the posture its components hold
The secrets surface carries references and resolution only, never a value

tasks.title: Liveness stream (REQ-513): SSE posture events — immediate snapshot then bounded interval, emit-only, fail-closed

scenarios: The events stream emits the live posture on connect

tasks.title: Models read surface (REQ-514): verbatim LiteLLM control passthrough, key server-side, fail-closed

scenarios: The models surface relays the gateway report verbatim and fails closed when unwired

tasks.title: Contract read surface (REQ-515): the generated OpenAPI served verbatim via go:embed, drift-gated, fail-closed

scenarios: The contract surface serves the generated endpoint map verbatim

tasks.title: Estate read surface (REQ-516): latest published estate_snapshot served as nodes+edges; grounder reads, worker writes; fail-closed / available=false

scenarios: The estate surface serves the latest published graph snapshot
The estate surface reports no snapshot rather than fabricating a topology

tasks.title: Grounding scorecard (REQ-517): live aggregates over verdict/prediction/audit tables — verifier match-rate, blast-radius precision/recall, the shuffled-graph falsifiability signal, and band/floor-hold distribution; honest zeros over an empty spine; fail-closed

scenarios: The grounding scorecard publishes the verifier distribution and the falsifiability signal
The grounding scorecard reports honest zeros over an empty spine

tasks.title: Vote intake (REQ-518): session-authenticated POST binds {external_ref, approve} and signals the waiting Runner; voter = the session principal; 503 unwired; 409 on a closed decision window

scenarios: An authenticated operator vote signals the waiting decision it answers
A vote on a closed decision window reports conflict, never success

tasks.title: Canary safety + observability plane (REQ-525): MutationGate.Disable + worker halt-only kill-switch + armed mutation breaker + read-only /metrics exposition on grounder and worker (mutation stays OFF, no enable path)

scenarios: The mutation gate exposes a runtime disable that keeps mutation off
The safety metrics exposition renders mutation_enabled zero and the breaker gauge
